compiled_state.title: Publish ticket-lib-api-extension-pattern.md with naming, argv, error codes, legacy guard, and sourceability checklist
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## What to Create
plugins/dso/docs/ticket-lib-api-extension-pattern.md

## Content Requirements (from story scope)
The extension pattern spec must describe how downstream epics (2c28-e5b9, 4931-f639, e1b2-2653) can add new ops consistently. Sections required:
1. Function naming convention: use ticket_ prefix (e.g., ticket_myop); internal helpers use _ticketlib_ prefix
2. Argv parsing convention: use for arg in "$@"; case "$arg" in pattern (matches existing functions)
3. Error return codes: 0=success, 1=general error, 2=concurrency conflict, 3=not-found (align with existing ops)
4. DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 guard pattern (code template showing the fallback exec pattern)
5. Write/read integration points: use write_commit_event for writes; call python3 reducer for reads requiring state materialization
6. Sourceability checklist: no set -euo at library scope, no exit (use return), no trap EXIT, no GIT_* mutation, no caller-namespace shadowing

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/ticket-lib-api-extension-pattern.md exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-lib-api-extension-pattern.md
- [ ] All 6 required sections present
  Verify: grep -c "^##" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-lib-api-extension-pattern.md | awk "{exit (\$1 >= 6) ? 0 : 1}"
- [ ] DSO_TICKET_LEGACY code template included
  Verify: grep -q "DSO_TICKET_LEGACY" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-lib-api-extension-pattern.md
- [ ] Sourceability checklist present
  Verify: grep -q "sourceability\|Sourceability" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-lib-api-extension-pattern.md
